V-M-038.checks: Shared UI rules must make user and admin surfaces compact, consistent, and readable on mobile screens.
V-M-038.test-files: frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx frontend/src/pages/Config.tsx frontend/src/pages/Subscription.tsx frontend/src/index.css frontend-admin
V-M-038.commands: cd frontend && npm run build; Phase-23 compact UI static review and mobile viewport smoke; cd ../frontend-admin && npm run build during Phase-24 or full M-038 closure

levels.module-local: User frontend build and static compact UI review run after each compact shell, dashboard, config, or subscription change.
levels.wave-level: Phase-23 wave smoke checks layout density, no nested cards, no decorative hero/orb basis, stable controls, and safe text on user routes.
levels.phase-level: Full M-038 closure additionally requires Phase-24 admin build and mobile admin smoke before status can move from pending.

module-checks.check-1: User frontend build passes for Phase-23.
module-checks.check-2: Admin frontend build passes during Phase-24 or full M-038 closure.
module-checks.check-3: Compact UI rules avoid nested cards, oversized dashboard sections, decorative clutter, and horizontal scroll.
module-checks.check-4: Buttons, lists, tabs, dialogs, and confirmations have stable mobile dimensions.
module-checks.check-5: Operational screens do not start with marketing hero sections or repeated status panels.
module-checks.check-6: Text wraps or truncates intentionally for long emails, device keys, plan names, and status labels.

verification-matrix.rule-layout: Mobile shell uses concise navigation instead of a desktop-width sidebar and repeated identity/status panels.
verification-matrix.rule-density: Dashboard, config, and subscription pages use compact rows or flat sections instead of large decorative grids.
verification-matrix.rule-controls: Action buttons keep icon plus short label, stable touch target size, disabled state, and no layout shift while loading.
verification-matrix.rule-text: Long emails, device names, device keys, plan names, prices, and status labels wrap or truncate intentionally without overlap.
verification-matrix.rule-background: Operational surfaces do not rely on decorative radial-gradient/orb backgrounds or marketing hero composition.

scenarios.scenario-1: User cabinet uses compact layout rules while preserving VPN, billing, and device workflows.
scenarios.scenario-2: Admin console can later adopt the same rules in Phase-24 without changing the Phase-23 user scope.
scenarios.scenario-3: A redesigned screen remains card-heavy, desktop-first, decorative, or text-overlapping on phones.
scenarios.scenario-4: The compact system hides destructive actions without clear secondary placement or confirmation-safe affordance.
scenarios.scenario-5: CSS simplification makes loading, empty, error, modal, or disabled states resize the surrounding layout.

ui-rules.rule-2: No decorative radial-gradient/orb backgrounds as the basis of operational screens.
ui-rules.rule-3: No wide tables or raw pre blocks causing page-level horizontal scroll.
ui-rules.rule-4: Use lucide icons in action buttons where an icon exists.
ui-rules.rule-5: Use stable touch targets and row heights across loading, empty, success, and error states.

static-review.review-1: Layout does not preserve the 320px desktop sidebar as the primary phone navigation.
static-review.review-2: Dashboard does not keep decorative hero copy as the dominant first-screen element.
static-review.review-3: Config page does not expose raw preformatted config text in a way that creates page-level horizontal scroll.
static-review.review-4: Subscription page does not depend on oversized plan cards for basic purchase and renewal actions.

observability.telemetry-1: Compact UI evidence records route, viewport, scrollWidth, innerWidth, and checked layout rule.
observability.telemetry-2: UI evidence must not contain tokens, private keys, full VPN config text, payment secrets, or raw .env values.
observability.telemetry-3: Phase-23 evidence covers user frontend only; Phase-24 must add admin evidence before full M-038 closure.

evidence.evidence-1: Record Phase-23 user frontend build and mobile viewport smoke result.
evidence.evidence-2: Record Phase-24 admin frontend build and mobile viewport smoke result before marking M-038 complete.
evidence.evidence-3: Record static review result for nested cards, decorative background basis, wide raw config blocks, and stable control sizing.

V-M-038.autonomous-execution-safety: Autonomous Phase-23 execution is safe only for user frontend compact UI files. Admin frontend remains Phase-24 scope and deploy/install surfaces remain out of scope.
